title: lathyrus plitmannii
intro: Lathyrus plitmannii, also known as the 'Everlasting Pea', is a type of flowering legume native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is used to treat various health issues such as arthritis, wounds, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Lathyrus plitmannii include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, promote wound healing, and support overall digestive health. In herbal preparations, Lathyrus plitmannii is often used as a decoction, made by steeping the dried flowers and leaves in hot water, or as a tincture, which involves extracting its active compounds using a solvent like alcohol.
